Sir, Stakeholders have drawn attention of this Ministry to the serial no. 5 of notification No' G.s.R. 583(E) dated 13th June, 2012 which states thai requirements of reporting under section 143(3)(i) of the Companies Act 2013 shall not apply to certain private companres as mentioned therein and have sought clarification w.r.t. the financiai year(s) in respect of which the said exemption shall be applicable. The issue has been -examinecl in the Ministry and it is hereby clarified that the exemption shall be applicable for those audit reports in respect of financial statements pertaining to financial y"ur, .o*-urrcing on or after 1't Aprll,2076, which are made on oi after thgdate of the sald notification. 2.
